serviceClaims: Tailored U.S. immigration strategies for individuals, families, entrepreneurs, and businesses, repeating the promise to help clients reach work, residency, and business goals.
Identifies visa paths, property ownership issues, and business complexities, with supportive bullet points for personalized visa plans, comprehensive representation, and global perspective.
Reiterates the focus on supporting immigrants with personalized, culturally-attuned guidance derived from Ms. Henning’s experience.
disclaimers: Home page inherits the Spanish/English translation copy and mentions a holistic, culturally sensitive approach without introducing guarantees.

Emphasis on co-counseling with specialists and general counsel support.

Includes testimonials (via home translation) that remain anecdotal.

pages.title: Contact
serviceClaims: Same consultation fee details: $400/hour with half-hour minimum, credit toward flat-fee work; clients pay filing fees.
Promotes the contact form/booking widget for consultations.

Repeats that no financial advice or investment recommendations are provided and that financial decisions remain with clients.
